leadText: This article is about the sandwich ingredient. For the curry ingredient, see Precooked Burger. Hamburger (Japanese: ハンバーグ Hamburger) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V This very salty ingredient is the thing to add if you want to make your sandwich truly filling.
